---
title: "01. 庙算、五事与胜负先验"
subtitle: "Strategic Estimation and Pre-Battle Computation"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 1
categories: [sunzi, cultural, omega]
description: "How 始计 frames war as pre-battle inference from partial indicators, compressing complexity into a usable judgment of relative advantage."
---

**Chapters:** 始计第一  
**Omega Directions:** `rate-distortion information theory`, `spectral theory`, `modular tower inverse limit`

{{< include articles/category_01_strategic_estimation_pre_battle_computation.md >}}

---

[Back to Sunzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
